caseStudy.subtitle: Connecting freelance home pros with the tenants who need them.
caseStudy.description: Malaysian homeowners needed trusted help. Freelance servicers needed steady work. My Home Servicer bridges both sides with a marketplace that makes booking a home pro as simple as ordering a ride.
points: Two-sided marketplace connecting freelance servicers with tenants needing trusted help, built with Angular and Express.js. Gated role architecture across guest, customer, servicer, and admin portals, each secured with route guards and JWT middleware authority layers on both frontend and backend.

Quote-to-payment in one continuous flow with real-time order tracking across six status states, backed by an escrow-aware REST API. 30+ categories spanning 7 verticals from cleaning and repair to tech support, all wrapped in a responsive interface that scales from mobile to desktop.

items.title: Co-Bug Dump
items.description: Offline-first AI bug tracker built as a developer tool. Search, categorize, and resolve bugs without an internet connection.

items.title: SSG Resume Template
items.description: Static site generator resume template. Fast, customizable, deploy anywhere. Zero build step, pure HTML/CSS/JS.

about.bio: Six years across game studios and startups taught me one thing: the best products live at the intersection of engineering and art. From AAA 3D environments to full-stack marketplaces, I bring VFX precision to code - sweating the architecture, the shaders, the micro-interactions - the rasa of a product.
